hero.title: Ngā pūnaha pūkaha e tauine ana
hero.subtitle: Pūmanawa Hinonga · AI & Ako Mīhini · Hanganga Kapua · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Mai i te aunoatanga atamai ki ngā pūhara kapua-māori, ka hoahoa mātou me te tuku i te hangarau e whakamana ana i ngā umanga whai rawa — i te wā tika, i te pūtea, i te tauine.
hero.trustLine: E whakawhirinaki ana ngā kamupene puta noa i te ao

services.subtitle: Ā mātou Ratonga
services.title: Pūkaha Tūāwhiorangi-Katoa
services.description: E ono ngā wāhi whakaharatau. Kotahi te tīma. Ia apa o tō tāpae hangarau — mai i ngā pūrere tapa ki ngā papatohu hinonga.

customSoftware.title: Whanaketanga Pūmanawa Ritenga
customSoftware.description: Ko ngā taupānga hōu i hangaia ki ngā ratonga moroiti, ngā API, me te hoahoa kapua-māori.

aiMl.title: AI, ML & Mōhiohio Pakihi
aiMl.description: Ngā paipa AI/ML, ngā papatohu Power BI, me ngā tātaritanga arā atu anō e huri ana i ngā raraunga hei whakataunga.

cloud.title: Hoahoa Kapua me te Hanganga
cloud.description: Hanganga kapua-maha me ngā ipu, tūmau, me te tauine ā-ao i hangaia ki roto.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Ngā pūrere tūhono, ngā māhanga mamati, me te rorohiko tapa mō te Ahumahi 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Pūkaha Pūhara
devops.description: Ngā paipa CI/CD, te hanganga hei waehere, me te mātakitaki mai i te tuku ki te whakanaotanga.

digital.title: Huringa Mamati me te Tohutohu
digital.description: Rautaki hangarau, mahere huarahi whakahou, me te tohutohu ā-ringa.

cta.title: Me hanga tātou i tētahi mea tino nui
cta.description: Mai i te whanaketanga pūmanawa ritenga me ngā rongoā hiko-AI ki te hanganga kapua me te aunoatanga - ka tukua e mātou ngā ratonga hangarau mutunga-ki-te-mutunga e hāngai ana ki ō whakaritenga.

credibility.subtitle: Our Track Record
credibility.title: Ngā Hua, Ehara i <gradient>te Kī Taurangi</gradient>
credibility.titlePlain: Ngā Hua, Ehara i te Kī Taurangi
credibility.description: Mai i Sarajevo ki Oslo, Amsterdam, me Berlin. Ka tukuna ngā pūnaha hinonga i te wā tika, i ia wā.

atlascopco.label: Kapua IAM mō Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: I hoahoa i te hanganga Tuakiri Kotahi ā-kapua tuatahi mō Atlas Copco i Azure Kubernetes, e whakaiti ana i ngā utu me te pupuri i te whakatikatika hinonga.

orange.label: Pūhara Ārai ā-Ipurangi Karaka
orange.outcome: I hangaia te hanganga Azure Kubernetes, ngā paipa CI/CD, me te whakaurunga ServiceNow ritenga mō te umanga haumarutanga ā-ipurangi o Uropi.

telecom.label: Pūhara Telecom GIS & AR
telecom.outcome: I hangaia te pūhara GIS e whakamahere ana i ngā taputapu o raro puta noa i Tiamana me te haurapa tūtukitanga e ārai ana i te tūkinotanga hanganga miriona Ūropi.

iot.label: Pūhara IoT & Edge Cloud
iot.outcome: E whakahaere ana a Azure IoT Hub i ngā mano pūrere, e tukatuka ana a Synapse i te nuinga o ngā haupae waea, me te whakarōpūtanga tapa e tapa ana i ngā utu karere mā ~90%.

drone.label: Pūhara Drone Motuhake
drone.outcome: He pūmana rererangi ritenga me te arawhiti 4G-ki-Azure IoT Hub e taea ai te rere BVLOS motuhake mō te aroturuki ahuwhenua me te tuku utanga.

payment.label: Whakaora Pūnaha Utu
payment.outcome: I whakaorangia te waharoa utu rahua mō te taupānga pūkoro Nōwei mā te waehere tawhito kāore i te whai mana. Kore utu heke i muri i te whakahoutanga.

game.label: Utauta Dev Kēmu AAA
game.outcome: I hangaia te monomai Maya e tapahi ana i te tauira 3D me te wā hākoritanga mā te 50% i tētahi studio AAA nui, i whakaaetia hei utauta paerewa i roto i te paipa whakanao.

social.label: Pūhara Pāpori ā-Tauwāhi
social.outcome: He taupānga dating hoahoa mō te tirohanga pō o Paniora me te whakataurite geolocation, karere wā tūturu, me ngā whakamōhiotanga pana mō tētahi kiritaki UK.

iga.label: Pūhara IGA Maha-Tenant
iga.outcome: I hangaia te backend uho mō te pūhara whakahaere tuakiri kapua-māori e mahi ana i ngā kiritaki Fortune 500 me te Tuakiri Uho ASP.NET ritenga mō NoSQL i te tauine hinonga.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Pātata, Tukunga Huri noa
euAdjacent.description: Ngā haora mahi CET me ngā wheako e hāngai ana i Nōwei, Hōrana, Tiamana, me tua atu.

yourEngineers.title: Ō Kaipūkaha, Ehara i te Kaihoko
yourEngineers.description: Ngā mema o te tīma tūturu kua mau ki tō rerengamahi me ō utauta. Kāore he kaiwhakahaere pūkete, kāore he tūtira tīkiti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Pūmārō ki te Kapua
hardwareToCloud.description: Mai i te pūmanawa mārō pūrere tāmau ki ngā paipa Azure Synapse hinonga. Pūmanawa tāpae-katoa puta noa i ia apa.

partners.subtitle: Tāpae Hangarau
partners.title: Tāpae Whakamātauria e <gradient></gradient> te Pakanga
partners.description: Kāore mātou e whakamahi noa i ēnei utauta - kua tukuna e mātou ngā pūnaha whakanao ki a rātou. Mai i Microsoft Azure ki Kubernetes, kei a mātau kaipūkaha he tohunga tūturu o te ao.

cloudInfra.label: Kapua me te Hanganga
cloudInfra.description: Hoahoa kapua-maha me te whakaraupapa ipu me te hanganga hei waehere.

frontend.label: Muamua
frontend.description: Ngā anga wae hōu me te haumaru momo me ngā utauta hanga arotau.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Ngā pūhara tūmau kōeke hinonga, ngā reo pūnaha, me ngā tauira API hou.

data.label: Raraunga & Rokiroki
data.description: Ngā penapena pānga, tuhinga, pūmahara-roto hoki me te rapu kuputuhi-katoa.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Ngā paipa CI/CD, mana putanga, me te hua kaiwhakawhanake.

cloudNative.title: Kapua-Māori mā te Taunoa
cloudNative.description: He ipu ia kaupapa, he CI/CD-driven, ā, i hangaia mō te tauine whakapae mai i te rā tuatahi.

fullStack.title: Matatau Tāpae-Katoa
fullStack.description: Mai i ngā frontends React ki ngā ratonga moroiti .NET ki ngā kāhui Kubernetes — kotahi tīma, mutu ki te mutunga.

productionProven.title: Kua Whakamātauria te Whakanaotanga
productionProven.description: Ehara ēnei i te hangarau whakaaturanga. Ko ia utauta kua whakarārangitia e whakamana ana i ngā pūnaha tūturu e mahi ana i ngā kaiwhakamahi tūturu i tēnei rā.

faq.subtitle: Pūtake Mātauranga
faq.title: Ngā <gradient>Pātai</gradient> Auau
faq.description: Ngā mea katoa e hiahia ana koe ki te mōhio mō te mahi tahi me Horizon Tech

scope.question: He aha tō whānuitanga o te mahi?
scope.answer: Ka tukua e mātou ngā kaupapa hangarau mutunga-ki-te-mutunga: ngā pūmanawa umanga ritenga, ngā paipa AI/ML, ngā hanganga kapua, ngā pūnaha IoT, te aunoatanga DevOps, me te tohutohu panoni mamati. Ahakoa kei te hiahia koe i tētahi pūhara katoa i hangaia mai i te raruraru, i tētahi whakaurunga kua ūnga rānei ki tō tāpae tīariari, ka whakahaere mātou i te hoahoa, te whanaketanga, te whakamātautau, me te tukunga.

stack.question: He aha tō tāpae hangarau uho?
stack.answer: Ko tā mātou tāpae uho e pokapū ana i runga i ngā pūhara kōeke hinonga: Azure me AWS mō te kapua, .NET me Node.js mō te backend, React me Angular mō frontend, Kubernetes me Docker mō te whakaritenga, me Terraform mō te hanganga hei waehere. Ka mahi whānui hoki mātou me Python mō ngā kawenga mahi AI/ML, Power BI me Fabric mō te mōhiohio pakihi, me PostgreSQL, SQL Server, me MongoDB mō ngā raraunga.

enterprise.question: Me pēhea tō whakahaere i ngā kaupapa hinonga?
enterprise.answer: Ka tīmata ia tautohetohe ki tētahi wāhanga hura hei tautuhi i te whānuitanga, te hoahoanga, me ngā tīmatanga. Ka whiwhi koe i tētahi tīma whakatapua me tētahi kaiārahi hangarau, ngā arotakenga tohu auau, me te urunga hāngai ki ngā kaipūkaha e hanga ana i tō pūnaha. Ka whai mātou i ngā sprints agile me ngā whakaaturanga kaiāwhina, ka pupuri i ngā papa kaupapa pūataata, me te whakarato pūrongo kaunuku ia wiki.

support.question: He aha te āhua o te tautoko i muri i te whakarewatanga?
support.answer: Ka tukuna e mātou ngā taumata tautoko hanganga me ngā SLA kua tautuhia, tae atu ki te aroturuki 24/7, te urupare takahanga, te arotautanga mahinga, me te auau āhuahira. Ko ā mātou whakaaetanga tautoko e kapi ana i ngā whakatika iro, ngā pūreirei haumarutanga, te tauine hanganga, me ngā taki hauora hauora - i whakaritea ki ō whakaritenga wā me te wā urupare.

integration.question: Ka taea e koe te whakauru ki ā mātou hanganga tīariari?
integration.answer: Tino pai. He tohunga mātou ki te whakahōutanga tawhito, ngā whakaurunga API-tuatahi, me ngā hekenga kapua hinu. Ahakoa e hiahia ana koe ki te tūhono ki ngā pūnaha ERP ā-rohe, te heke mai i ngā monoliths ki ngā ratonga moroiti, te arawhiti rānei i ngā pātengi raraunga tawhito me ngā frontends o nāianei, kei a mātou ngā pukapuka tākaro hekenga me te wheako whakaurunga kia ngāwari ai.

industries.question: He aha ngā mahi i mahi ai koe?
industries.answer: Kua tukua e tā mātou tīma ngā kaupapa puta noa i ngā wāhanga fintech, rongoā, logistics, e-commerce, pūngao, me ngā wāhanga kāwanatanga. E mārama ana mātou ki ngā whakaritenga ā-umanga pēnei i te PCI-DSS mō ngā utunga, ngā whakaaro HIPAA mō ngā raraunga hauora, te whakaū i te GDPR mō ngā mākete EU, me te waeatanga wā tūturu mō te IoT ahumahi.

engagement.question: He aha te āhua o te tukanga whakauru?
engagement.answer: Ka tīmata ki tētahi waea hura kia mārama ai ki ō whāinga me ō whenua hangarau. Mai i reira, ka tukuna e mātou he tuhinga whānuitanga me ngā tūtohutanga hoahoa, rārangi wā, me te wehenga pūtea penapena. Ina whakaaetia, ka tīmata mātou me tētahi tīma whakatapua, ka uru ki ō utauta me ō rerengamahi, ka tīmata i te sprint tuatahi i roto i ngā rā.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: Kei a koe tonu ngā pātai?
faq.ctaDescription: He kaupapa kei roto i te hinengaro? Me kōrero tātou i te whānuitanga, te rārangi wā, me te pūtea.
